final:
// // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer that selects between four inputs (a, b, c, d) based on the values of two select inputs (sel_1, sel_0). However, it always outputs 'd' regardless of the select inputs.
module mux_4to1(
    input a,
    input b,
    input c,
    input d,
    input sel_1,
    input sel_0,
    output reg out_always
);

always @(*) begin
    if(sel_1 == 0 && sel_0 == 0) begin
        out_always = a;
    end
    else if(sel_1 == 0 && sel_0 == 1) begin
        out_always = b;
    end
    else if(sel_1 == 1 && sel_0 == 0) begin
        out_always = c;
    end
    else begin
        out_always = d;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer that selects between four inputs (a, b, c, d) based on the values of two select inputs (sel_1, sel_0). However, it always outputs 'd' regardless of the select inputs.
